name: Territors
short_description: Enter the world of particles in this fast-paced card game, where the Proton and Neutron factions clash in intense matchups! Enhance your factions with new powerful particles, set and upgrade your deck, and prepare to face the ultimate challenge.
detailed_description:
The quick card game of atomic energy!

Step into the microscopic world of particles with Protons & Neutrons an exciting card game where atomic power collide!

Players take control of Proton and Neutron factions, competing to unlock all the cards by winning intense matches. With each victory, you'll have a chance to unlock new cards, build stronger factions, and face increasingly challenging enemies in this thrilling race for atomic supremacy.

The game is designed to be quick and easy to pick up, offering a thrilling experience without being time-consuming. Each match is fast-paced, making it perfect for shorter sessions.

The game features a drag-and-drop system, allowing players to combine cards in countless ways, each with unique advantages based on their abilities, unique card powers and bonuses, enemy special traits, and a dynamic inventory size that adjusts based on your performance, enabling players to strategize and customize their decks for maximum impact.

The game itself offers great replayability thanks to:

Multiple dynamic card categories

                                         

Each card comes with a variety of dynamic attributes, including attack power, defense power, value, multiple abilities, bonuses, size, and level. Its performance can be optimized, and its role within the deck can be adjusted accordingly.

Distinct factions

Each faction has its own strengths, weaknesses, and playstyle, offering fresh strategic choices each time you play.

Dynamic enemy growth

As you grow stronger, so does your enemy. The challenge continuously escalates, keeping you on your toes as the stakes rise.

Enemy multiple difficulty levels and traits

The game can scale in difficulty, allowing you to face off against different levels of enemies. The enemy has access to various traits, challenging you to constantly adapt and rethink your strategies with every encounter. To make things even more difficult, they can combine these abilities, making them even tougher to defeat.

Randomized card unlocks

Each new game offers a different order of card unlocks, creating a unique experience every time you play.
